data.title: Kia America reports 12% rise in July sales, with retail sales up 9%. Year-to-date sales up 8% over 2024 record pace. Carnival, Sportage, Telluride achieve highest-ever July sales.
data.description: Kia dealerships reported a 9% increase in retail sales for July compared to the previous year, marking their best-ever July performance. Year-to-date, Kia sales have risen by 8% over the record set in 2024. The models Carnival, Sportage, and Telluride saw their highest-ever July sales. This data comes from Kia's headquarters in Irvine, California, as of August 1, 2025.

data.title: San’an Optoelectronics and Inari Amertron Berhad to acquire 100% of Lumileds Holding B.V.'s shares. Transformative move for LED industry.
data.description: In a joint press release, San’an Optoelectronics and Inari Amertron Berhad revealed their agreement to acquire Lumileds Holding B.V. and its subsidiaries in Europe and Asia, known as Lumileds International. This strategic move marks a significant step in their business evolution, indicating confidence in Lumileds International's future success and growth in the dynamic LED industry. The definitive deal signifies a crucial milestone as the companies align to harness opportunities in the rapidly maturing LED sector.

data.title: Magna reports Q2 2025 financial results, ended June 30, 2025. Stock symbols: TSX: MG; NYSE: MGA.
data.description: In Aurora, Ontario, on August 1, 2025, Magna International Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company's stock trades on the TSX under the symbol MG and on the NYSE under the symbol MGA.

data.title: Amazon invests in startup Fable, dubbed 'Netflix of AI,' allowing users to create episodes from prompts or photos. New storytelling approach.
data.description: Users can create complete episodes using prompts or photos on the platform, with Amazon investing in this innovative form of storytelling.
EUROZONE CORE CPI YOY FLASH ACTUAL 2.3%

data.title: Avast recognized as top antivirus for Windows 10 in 2025 by Software Experts for strong security features.
data.description: In August 2025, Software Experts acknowledged Avast as a leading antivirus program for Windows 10*. Avast's Premium Security and Avast Ultimate were commended for their robust security features, enhanced privacy safeguards, and intuitive utilities tailored to address users' needs. The recognition underscores Avast's excellence in providing top-notch antivirus solutions for Windows 10 users.

data.title: OYO partners with IBS Software for global digital transformation in hospitality, impacting portfolio of brands like Sunday, Belvilla, and more.
data.description: An announcement was made on August 1, 2025, in Atlanta, that OYO, a worldwide travel technology company, has joined forces with IBS Software to expedite digital transformation on a global scale. This collaboration will involve OYO and its various brands such as Sunday, Belvilla, Dancenter, Traum, Check My Guest, Motel 6, and Studio 6.

data.title: Wipfli receives strategic investment from New Mountain Capital to enhance growth and innovation in client solutions.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 1, 2025, Wipfli LLP, a prominent provider of accounting, tax, and advisory services in the middle market, disclosed their definitive agreement for a substantial minority investment from New Mountain Capital. The investment deal signifies a significant milestone in the firm's growth strategy and further establishes their position as a key player in the industry. This strategic investment is poised to bring about new opportunities and drive expansion for Wipfli LLP.
